Systems.name: Linux

featured_projects.name: Android Rooting: Proot vs Chroot
featured_projects.description: A comprehensive guide on rooting Android devices and the architectural differences between Proot and Chroot. Explores kernel-level solutions like Magisk and KernelSU for high-performance Linux userspaces in Termux.

featured_projects.name: DockForge
featured_projects.description: An automation engine for Docker environments. Automatically detects system compatibility, installs Docker if missing, and orchestrates container deployments with zero manual configuration.

featured_projects.name: AI Voice Cloning (RVC)
featured_projects.description: [UPCOMING] A deep dive into training AI voice models. Covers environment setup with CUDA, PyTorch, and FFmpeg for high-fidelity real-time voice cloning and dataset preparation.

achievements: Authored Guide on Android Rooting (Proot vs Chroot)
